title: SHACOS 10 Pcs Pink Peony Artificial Flowers, Realistic Faux Peonies Silk Flowers with Single Stems Artificial Flower Bouquet for Home Decor Wedding Party Table Centerpieces Floral Arrangement
features: Size: Pink flowers bouquet height: 32 cm / 13 inches, single flower head diameter: approximately 12 cm / 4.7 inches, single flower height: 8 cm /3.15 inches, stem height: 24 cm / 9.45 inches. The package includes 10 PCS artificial peonies with single stem (vase not included).

Material: The flowers and leaves of fake flowers are made of silk, flower stem has a iron wire embedded in the plastic that can be bent and cut. Peony flower bouquet is made with exquisite coloring techniques, and is as natural and real as a real flower, and full of vitality.

Vivid Look: This carefully crafted silk flowers feature rich and full layers of petals, with realistic textures and appearance, making them perfect for adding a delicate touch to your home decor, wedding decorations, table centrepiece or or office decor.

Easy to Maintain: Faux flowers are not easily damaged or faded, and can maintain their bright colors for a long time. If there is dust or other stains, simply blow them off with a low-temperature hair dryer or wipe them with a soft cloth or sponge.

Perfect DIY Floral Decoration: The artificial flower heads with single stems are the perfect complement to flower arrangement. The adjustable long stems and realistic appearance can be paired with any decoration to add it to any occasion's decor.
